* Licenses: Kahnawake Gaming Commission, Curacao (mentioned in one source). [SOURCE: covers.com, la-press.org | 2024-12-09 | Text]
* Ownership: National Casino Global Ltd (according to one source). [SOURCE: recife.pe.gov.br | 2024-12-09 | Text]

5. BONUS STRUCTURE
* Welcome: Two-part welcome bonus: 100% match up to $500 on the first deposit + 100 free spins on Avalon: The Lost Kingdom; 50% match up to $1,000 on the second deposit. 40x wagering requirement applies. [SOURCE: covers.com, la-press.org | 2024-12-09 | Text]
